name: LGA Footprint Designer
description: Interactive LGA footprint generator with clickable pad grid, shape, soldermask and staggered options.
description_full: Opens a dialog where you configure pitch, pad size, shape (rect/round/roundrect), soldermask type (SMD/NSMD), staggered grid, and interactively enable/disable individual pads by clicking them. Generates a .kicad_mod footprint ready to use.
